blockedAssertions.detail: The embed capability code works correctly (build-request produces valid JSON), but invoke cannot authenticate with the NVIDIA API without an API key. This is an environment limitation, not a code defect.

notes: Round 3 confirms same blocking issue as rounds 1 and 2: NVIDIA_API_KEY not available in environment
VAL-EMBED-001 and VAL-EMBED-002 remain passed (no change needed)
The embed capability implementation is correct - VAL-EMBED-003 cannot be validated without API key
